---
title: "Projects"
---

## [Blender Extensions](https://extensions.blender.org/author/41884/)  <a href="https://extensions.blender.org/author/41884/">![](https://download.blender.org/branding/community/blender_community_badge_black.svg){height="1.5em"}</a>

<img align="right" width="400" height="160" src="images/screenshots/mixer_1.png">

### OnlyBlends.Mixer 

[Blender Extension](https://extensions.blender.org/add-ons/only-blends-mixer/) 

[Github](https://github.com/Zulhakar/OnlyBlendsMixer) 

[Documentation](https://zulhakar.github.io/OnlyBlends.Mixer.Docs/) 

<img align="right" width="400" height="160" src="images/screenshots/gamepad.png">

### OnlyBlends.Gamepad 

[Blender Extension](https://extensions.blender.org/add-ons/only-blends-gamepad/) 

[Github](https://github.com/Zulhakar/OnlyBlendsGamepad) 

<br><br>

### OnlyBlends.Core 

[Github](https://github.com/Zulhakar/OnlyBlendsCore)
